import json
import socket
from typing import Any


def load_user_session(data: bytes) -> dict:
    return json.loads(data)


def handle_client_request(conn: socket.socket) -> dict:
    raw = conn.recv(65536)
    session_data = json.loads(raw)
    return session_data


def read_uploaded_object(upload_bytes: bytes) -> Any:
    return json.loads(upload_bytes)
